title: Yahir's Austin Treasure Map — 84 categorized spots
html:
The Austin Treasure Map live at yg4president.github.io/austin-treasure-map/ — Leaflet map of Austin (Steiner Ranch / Lake Austin / West Lake Hills / Manor / Hornsby Bend / Webberville / Sunset Valley) with 84 discoverable "treasures" categorized Eat 39 / Drink 11 / Explore 16 / Fun 11 / Shop 7. UI surfaces a "Next Adventure" prompt ("In the realm of North Austin, a gem lies undiscovered...") with Re-roll / Reveal buttons and Map/Topo/City style toggles.

TL;DR

  • Austin Treasure Map is a personal-favorites discovery game Yahir built — 84 spots tagged across 5 categories.
  • Hosted on yg4president.github.io (his GitHub Pages handle) using Leaflet + OpenStreetMap.
  • Shape: gamified personal-recommendations engine ("Next Adventure" with reveal/re-roll) — sibling to the Best Sushi in Austin guide pattern.

austin treasure map · austin tx · the best sushi in austin guide · github pages
